title: U.S. operations against Iran expand to Indian Ocean with tanker capture
summary_full: The capture of the tanker ship Tifani follows a Trump administration directive to interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.
summary_public: The capture of the tanker ship Tifani follows a Trump administration directive to interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: interdict sanctioned vessels believed to be involved in smuggling Iranian oil.
